title: Bridge Essay: CAM and Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**CAM and Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder.** — Evid Based Complement Alternat Med. PMID: 17342251. DOI: 10.1093/ecam/nel041. In the form of the Transcendental Meditation program CAM offers amethod of eliminating deep-rooted stress, the efficacy of which has been demonstrated in several related studies. Any discussion of CAM and post-traumatic stress disorder should include astudy of its application to Vietnam War Veterans in which improvements were observed on all variables, and several participants were able to return to work after several years of being unable to hold ajob.
